settings.heading: Description
settings.content: Premium quality tapware engineered for lasting performance. Each piece is crafted to the highest standard and backed by our comprehensive warranty.

settings.heading: Specifications
settings.content: Material: Brass body with chrome plating. Finish: Available in Matte Black, Brushed Brass, Brushed Nickel, and Chrome. Warranty: 10-year manufacturer warranty.

settings.heading: Delivery
settings.content: Free shipping on orders over $1,000. Standard delivery 3–7 business days. Express available at checkout. Ships Australia-wide.
